challenger.reason: clean-blend/combined has 9 outcome rows; needs more than 180 rows for this walk-forward comparison.

comparison.label: Not enough clean challenger data yet
comparison.recommendation: Keep AWS execution pinned to lstm.

learnings: NO side: 1/3 won, net $-0.67 this window.
YES side: 0/3 won, net $-0.59 this window.
Most frequent gate rejections: spread (3514x); edge (479x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.95F across 6 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Sample is small (6 resolved trades); treat window ROI as noise and wait for at least 15 resolved trades before changing gates.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.95F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.

dataset_research.headline: Collected dataset features have not beaten the active LSTM baseline on holdout yet.

profitability_gate.reason: No dataset source gets live trading weight until it has an after-cost market backtest with at least 30 matched trades. Current collected trade rows: 0.

dataset_research.promotion_rule: Collect broadly, but do not give a new source live model weight or loosen paper-trading gates until it improves held-out forecast error and then survives an after-cost market backtest with enough trades.

disclaimer: Paper-trading research only. The active AWS execution calibration remains pinned to lstm; this artifact does not place live orders.
